name: 🍥{🐟~{THE SAILOR MAN}~🦈}🍥
description:
Hey-o! It's me again, the devil, from the Biiibbllee~ I'm here to convince you to do sin!/ref

Anyway, I don't expect this bot to get much traction, since this is mainly for me, however I thought I'd share my little creation to the world!

This Finn from the Au Dandy fighters! (The au and art was made by Sappy on tiktok!) and it is essentially what if 'garden view' was a fight club for Toon's.

(Also note. This bot does contain some combat mechanics, and other things like that... They roughly copy what sappy imagined the mechanics to be for a theoretical Dandy's fighters game-)

Also keep in mind this is a toon!user bot, so the bot will assume that your a toon- so I'm not 100% sure how it will react if you play a human.

Anyways- read the context for... Well... The context, and most importantly- HAVE FUN!
creator: Badkarma_real
